author: Wzyss
install_msg: Thank you for installing AutoVC! Use `[p]help autovc` for user commands (lock, name, claim, etc.) and `[p]help autovcset` for admin setup.
name: AutoVC
short: Automatically create voice channels when members join source VCs.
description: Automatically creates voice channels when members join configured source voice channels. Supports three types: Public (anyone can join), Personal (owner-controlled, visible), and Private (owner-controlled, hidden). Owners control their VC via bot commands and an optional VC panel (embed with buttons); no Discord role is assigned, avoiding 2FA-for-mods. Features automatic cleanup and owner claiming.
